$comment: Layer C for COMMISSION vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The PERFORM CALC-COMM THRU CALC-EXIT range is inlined and its GO TO CALC-EXIT early return is structurally eliminated into an if/else, so Layer C enumerates the capped path and the completion-bonus path. The ROUNDED base commission (WS-SALES * 7.5 / 100) yields a source*constant rounding half-boundary obligation solved by congruence; the WS-COMMISSION > WS-CAP test yields a branch boundary at sales ~ 6666.67.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 COMMISSION (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-commission)
